name: Eggs Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Clean and drain the spinach. Heat the olive oil in a saucepan until hot, then add the spinach. Cover and cook until tender. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Arrange the cooked spinach in 4 individual oven-proof dishes. Break one egg into each dish and sprinkle 1 tablespoon of cheese on top.
4. Bake for about 3 minutes, or until the egg whites are firm but still soft.
